title: elaphoglossum calaguala
intro: Elaphoglossum calaguala, also known as Polypodium calaguala, is a type of fern native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum calaguala include treating urinary tract infections, menstrual disorders, and digestive issues, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Elaphoglossum calaguala is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application to promote wound healing and skin health.
